findings.title: AI Code Analysis Complete
findings.description: Groq analyzed your page HTML and generated improvement recommendations. See the fix plan below.

summary: The webpage appears to be visually correct and functional, with no obvious issues found. The page loads properly on both desktop and mobile devices, displaying the expected content without any errors.
bundled_fix_prompt: Fix the web app's issues by modifying the HTML and CSS as follows: update the `body` CSS to set a maximum width for desktop screens (1280px) and ensure proper scaling on mobile devices (390px) by adding a meta tag for responsive design. Modify the `div` element containing the `h1` and `p` elements to have an ID, such as "main-content", and update its CSS to remove the opacity setting. Change the `a:link` and `a:visited` CSS to include hover and active states for better usability. Ensure the `h1` element has a clear font family and size for readability. For mobile devices, adjust the font size of the `h1` element to 1.2em and the `p` elements to 0.9em. Update the `a` element with the href "https://iana.org/domains/example" to have a clear ID, such as "learn-more-link", and modify its CSS to have a distinct color and hover effect. Lastly, add alt text to any missing images and ensure all interactive elements are accessible and navigable via keyboard input.
